summary: Full E2E test of D+D e-commerce. Backend: 27/27 pytest tests pass (public catalog list/sort/search/pagination/by-sku/categories, admin login, stats, CRUD with 401/404/409 edge cases, CSV upload upsert mode). Frontend: hero text correct ('D+D · Alcorta · desde siempre'), 8.142 products load from API, sorting dropdown works, search debounced, Add-to-cart button visible with text and increments header counter, cart drawer shows items with WhatsApp checkout button, /admin login rejects wrong password and accepts 'Netri 437', 3 admin tabs work, inline stock edit persisted to DB, manual product creation works, WhatsApp FAB hidden on /admin as expected. All catalog images return 404 (Cloudinary account empty per E1 note) — ImageFallback renders gracefully with initials.

issues: Categoría field uses native <select> instead of shadcn Select — minor visual inconsistency with rest of the app, not a blocker
All Cloudinary images 404 (expected per E1 — empty cloudinary account). ImageFallback handles it nicely with initials placeholder.

action_items: Optional: replace native <select> in /app/frontend/src/pages/Admin.jsx (ManageProducts row & AddProduct form) with shadcn Select for visual consistency.
Optional: upload products to Cloudinary or change image URLs so catalog shows real photos (currently 100% fallback). Not a code bug.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is single-file (~355 lines) — acceptable for current scope but if more endpoints are added consider splitting routes/models/services.
Token mechanism is just the plain ADMIN_PASSWORD echoed back — fine for an internal back-office but cannot be revoked. OK for MVP.
Public _id is always excluded via PUBLIC_PROJECTION — good. ObjectId leakage verified absent in 5 endpoints.
All admin endpoints validate token via _require_admin — consistent.
@app.on_event is deprecated in newer FastAPI; consider lifespan handler in a future refactor. Not blocking.
test_credentials: Admin password 'Netri 437' (with space) — sourced from /app/memory/test_credentials.md and /app/backend/.env ADMIN_PASSWORD
seed_data_creation: None persisted. All TEST_* products created during testing were deleted via API in teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite ready at /app/backend/tests/test_dd_api.py (27 tests, ~3s run). Uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Cleans up TEST_ prefixed SKUs. Cloudinary 404s on home are EXPECTED (E1 confirmed empty account). Categories real distribution: General=8.138, others=0 until real CSV uploaded with proper categories. The 'Todos' tab shows all 8.142 by default.
